steps.title: Place however inside the clause
steps.content: The sentence says few particles are likely to reach Earth's surface because most burn up in the mesosphere. The word however is not joining two independent clauses here; it is being inserted parenthetically after surface, before the dependent since clause explains the reason.

steps.title: Keep since dependent
steps.content: Choice A puts a semicolon after however even though the following since clause is dependent. Choice C puts a semicolon before that dependent clause, and Choice D makes the since clause a fragment after a period. Commas around however keep the sentence grammatical. The answer is B.
